title: Wyndham India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Wyndham India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Wyndham India in Rajkot is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Wyndham India:
Wyndham India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wyndham India!
